title: Assistant Store Manager - Spar India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Spar India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Spar India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Spar India:
Spar India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spar India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
